Introducing GroundFloor

Back the next
big thing.

Every legend started in a bedroom. Now you can be the reason they made it out. Fund the ads. Share the credit. Own the moment.

From the bedroom.

To the festival.

How It Works

Simple as a song.

01

Discover an artist

Browse unsigned artists and hear their music before anyone else. Find the voice that gives you chills.

02

Back their song

Put in as little as $5. Contributions pool together until they hit a meaningful ad budget — then we deploy it.

03

Watch it spread

Your money becomes Spotify, TikTok, and Instagram ads. You get a real breakdown of every listener reached.

04

Claim your credit

Earn an "Early Believer" badge linked to your profile. When they blow up, everyone knows you were there first.

For Artists

We work for you. Not the label.

You sign nothing away. You keep your rights. We just help the people who already believe in you turn that belief into real reach.

  • Keep 100% of your masters and royalties
  • One simple permission form — no legal maze
  • See exactly where every dollar was spent
  • Build a fanbase that's invested in your success
  • No upfront cost — your fans fund the campaign
JM

Jordan Maeve
